en-GB.description: A minimal development skill used to test a legacy display template followed by AudioPlayer playback.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask legacy audio test to play test
en-GB.name: Legacy Audio Test
en-GB.summary: Tests a legacy display template with Alexa AudioPlayer.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Open the skill and confirm that it attempts to show a legacy BodyTemplate2 screen and start the test audio stream.
